title: Freeze-Frame + Mask Self-Composite
result_description: Multiple versions of you (some frozen) share one frame — a 'wait, how?' illusion built from masks + freeze frames over a locked-off shot.
note: The reel narrates only the voiceover; the technique is taken from the creator's caption ('I used masks and freeze frame'). Steps below are the standard recipe for that — refine against the demo frames if needed.

inputs.name: locked_takes
inputs.what_to_film: From a locked-off tripod, film yourself in the different positions/areas of frame you want to appear in at once (hold each pose a moment so it can be frozen).

timing.cue: the pose you want to hold

edit_steps.note: stack the clips/freezes on top of one another
draw a mask around each version of you so they all show in one frame

result.description: Several masked/frozen versions of you in one shot.
success_criteria: Each version occupies a distinct region
Locked-off framing keeps the background consistent

narration_transcript: what I want. I get to work where I want and what I want. I get to be my own boss. I get to work towards my future and my goals.

source_meta.caption:
Original clips vs the final edit! ✨ I got some of you with this one 😅 I used masks and freeze frame to achieve this effect!

#bts #contentcreator #ugc #vfx #ugccreator
